overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white cloak exploring a dark fantasy world. The clip begins with a vista of floating ruins and light beams from a cliff edge, transitions through a brief fade to black, then continues with a long walk across a stone bridge lined with colossal statues toward a gothic fortress.

events.description: character begins walking from stationary position along the cliff edge toward ruins
screen fades to black transitioning to the bridge location

agents.ego_description: standing on rocky cliff observing the vista of floating ruins and vertical light beams, then walking toward the stone ruins

entered.detail: jagged rock formation at the edge of a high cliff where the character stands
ancient stone structures suspended in the misty distance amid floating debris
bright white beams of light descending from the overcast sky
large circular stone basin mounted on a pedestal
gothic stone church ruins with tall arched windows and broken spires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a windswept cliff edge overlooking a vast, misty landscape with floating ruins and mysterious vertical beams of light piercing the overcast sky. The character stands still initially, then begins walking along the rocky path toward a dark gothic cathedral ruin, passing a stone bowl shrine on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: processional bridge with colossal statues leading to fortress

events.description: fade from black reveals stone bridge with colossal guardian statues lining both sides
passing closer to burning watchtowers increases warm firelight illumination on the scene

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the center of the wet cobblestone bridge toward the fortress entrance

entered.detail: wide cobblestone bridge with wet stones and grass growing between cracks
massive robed stone figure holding a staff, towering over the bridge
massive robed stone figure holding a staff, towering over the bridge
imposing dark stone fortress entrance with multiple levels and fortified walls
tall cylindrical stone tower with bright orange flames burning at the top

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, rain-slicked stone bridge flanked by colossal robed guardian statues holding staffs. The bridge leads toward a massive dark fortress entrance in the distance, with burning watchtowers providing warm orange light against the gray overcast sky. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow as the character progresses down the center of the bridge, passing between the silent stone giants.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, ethereal vista on a cliff edge toward the imposing silhouette of a gothic ruin. It begins with a panoramic view of a windswept landscape where floating ruins and vertical beams of light pierce an overcast, misty sky. As the character begins to move, the perspective shifts from the distant horizon to the immediate rocky terrain of the cliffside path. The scene then narrows its focus as the camera follows the character past a stone bowl shrine on the right, steadily advancing toward the dark architecture of the cathedral ruin ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rain-slicked stone bridge that leads toward a looming gothic fortress. It begins with the character walking down the center of the wide path, flanked by colossal robed guardian statues holding staffs. As the character progresses, the camera maintains a steady follow, passing between the silent stone giants under a heavy, overcast gray sky. The scene then opens up to reveal a massive dark fortress entrance in the distance, where the cold atmosphere is punctuated by the warm orange glow of burning watchtowers.
